## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm test`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm build` locally and they pass
- [ ] A behavior change to a package comes with an added or updated test
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes user-facing behavior, the embed API, or the `.ovb` format
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit -s` (adds a `Signed-off-by` line)
